parameters: All the students who got poor grades have been laid to rest here.
There aren't even any names carved into it.
Isn't it kind of sad that there's nothing left behind to prove
Sarasa kept a record of every student who died. She carved their
names here to remember them by.
I'm glad. I'm really glad they haven't been forgotten.
*Pant* *Pant*... Who are you? Please act like you didn't see me.
The next time I have to power the magic barrier, I'll be done for.
I'll be completely drained of magic and die. *Pant* *Pant*...
I'm supposed to be proud to die for the barrier, but I'm a coward.
Huh? If we take control of Rooklook, that won't happen anymore?
I'd be a fool to listen to the silver tongue of an intruder, but...
I don't have any other options.
I don't know how you plan to do it, but take this.
The barrier protects us from invasion by monsters and other
countries, but it's fueled by our lives.
Our lives are for the adults to use however they see fit. I try not to
Ngh... I have to get back or the teacher will punish me.
The magic barrier's been banned from use. That was your
Hmm? Intruders? You're still alive? Go away.
Long ago, an enemy nation attacked by placing explosives into birds.
Now we erect a barrier no matter what comes near us.
There are some birds flying this way... I have to strengthen
Ah! I'm about to run out of magic! I'm really low again today!
We have to put up the barrier even for birds. Some people have
Three hours until my shift's over... I think today's going to be my last.
I'm concentrating on the barrier right now! Don't talk to me!
I hate birds! Stop flapping around wherever you like! Stop flying
near the barrier on a whim!
You're intruders, aren't you? *Pant* *Pant*... I'm busy giving this
my all right now! Go away!
Crap, my head's spinning. I don't feel well, but if I take a rest,
*Pant* *Pant*... I can see another bird flying this way. Please...
I hate how dark this room is. It's supposed to be where the
students who died happy were put to rest, so...
Why is it so solemn in here? All the students are happy, right?
I know now. All of the students... were incredibly unhappy.
This is where all the students who died miserably now rest.
That's why it's so dark and sad in here.
The students who get good results will have their names engraved
on their tombstone. It's considered a great honor.
The gravestones are thrown out after a year, but until then it's a
great honor. One the students can be proud of.
This is where the dead students of the 263rd Ward are recorded.
As many as twenty have died in one day.
Another student died today, and the rest of the world will
The magic barrier's only to be used in emergencies. The demons
punish any attempts to force the students to power it.
I'm watching over the students to make sure they power the barrier
properly. Any slacking off will be punished.
My best friend has her name carved on this stone.
Her results were so good that she died as a wall for the imperial
soldiers! I should learn from her example and study hard!
My best friend has her name carved on this stone.
Why did I think that was something to be proud of? It's not.
I bet it'd feel great to glide down from here. Maybe we could charge
the humans to have a go?
Pretty much all the students who died powering the magic barrier
Their names aren't here. I don't want to end up like them,
without a single line left behind.
Seeing my best friend's name carved here is supposed to be a happy
Why am I crying? Is there something wrong with me?
Sarasa told me people cry because they're sad when their friends
I'm sad. Both me and my friend were really unhappy. *Sob*...
Ah! I'm about to run out of magic! I'm really low again today!
Ah! I'm about to run out of magic! I'm really low again today!
It's a record detailing the conditions the students live in. The King
of Maximus has signed it as the final consenting party.
